[[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] '''HL-444 hover loaders''' were [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] deployed on landing platforms throughout [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], assisting in light cargo relocation and [[Droid/Legends|droid]] traffic control with magnetic claws. They could also be found in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] hangars. The model employed a light [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engine, and required an operator versed in [[Binary/Legends|binary]] in order to function. Seeing in a 360 degree view, the droid could avoid potential obstacles while moving cargo; however it could not see directly above, or below itself.

They were also deployed to [[Hyperspace transport ring/Legends|hyperspace ring]] stations, where they assisted in the refueling of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

After the purging of the Jedi Temple, HL-444 loaders were used to carry dead Jedi to be cremated on the steps in front of the temple.
